summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Trending Detection Engine implementation. All new enhanced metrics, filtering, and scoring features working correctly. Backend APIs return proper data structure with new fields, frontend displays enhanced metrics beautifully, and backward compatibility maintained.
passed_tests: POST /api/trends returns videos with new enhanced metrics: views_per_day, engagement_rate, recency_days, competition_level
POST /api/trends returns trending_topics array (optional field) with relevant topic phrases
Trend scores properly calculated and normalized to 0-100 range using new formula
Videos with < 100 views are correctly filtered out from results
Competition levels display correctly as Low/Medium/High based on title keyword similarity
Views per day calculation matches expected formula: views / max(days, 1)
Engagement rate calculation working: (likes + comments) / max(views, 1)
Recency score calculation based on upload age (100 for ≤3 days, 75 for ≤7 days, etc.)
Competition score calculation based on keyword overlap with other videos
Frontend displays all new metrics in card grid: Views, Velocity, Engagement, Age
Competition badge shows correctly on video thumbnails with proper color coding
Trend scores display with proper CSS classes (high/medium/low)
Custom keyword input takes priority over niche dropdown selection
Backward compatibility - /api/analyse endpoint still works with Gemini AI analysis
Backward compatibility - /api/channel-analyse endpoint still works with full analytics
Channel analysis 'Explore Trend' buttons work and switch to trends tab
Analysis modal opens and displays AI-generated insights correctly
Tab switching between Niche Trends and Channel Analysis works smoothly
All API endpoints return proper HTTP status codes and error messages
Frontend handles loading states and displays success/error toasts appropriately
